name: SlDetails
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/details/details.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: open
props.description:
Indicates whether or not the details is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the details, or you
can use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the details' open state.

props.name: summary
props.description: The summary to show in the header. If you need to display HTML, use the `summary` slot instead.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the details so it can't be toggled.

events.name: show
events.description: Emitted when the details opens. (CEM event "sl-show")

events.name: afterShow
events.description: Emitted after the details opens and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-show")

events.name: hide
events.description: Emitted when the details closes. (CEM event "sl-hide")

events.name: afterHide
events.description: Emitted after the details closes and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-hide")
